hooks.command: DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; git -C "$DIR" status --porcelain -- src scripts specs tests 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || exit 0; "$DIR/scripts/pipeline.sh" || exit 2
hooks.statusMessage: src/scripts/specs/tests changed — running full pipeline.sh in background…
hooks.rewakeMessage: The end-of-turn pipeline (scripts/pipeline.sh) failed after changes under src/, scripts/, specs/, or tests/. Output follows:
